$comment: Static MCP tool definitions for this repo's deterministic verification gate set. Phase A: there is NO live MCP server (see docs/adr/0023-agent-interop-static-surface.md). The tool maps to scripts/preflight.mjs; the output schema mirrors that script's real per-gate record(name, status, note) shape. This describes the repo's OWN self-verification, not a service for external code.

tools.name: gate_verify
tools.title: Verify (deterministic preflight gate set)
tools.description: Run this repo's deterministic, no-LLM preflight gate set (lint, typecheck, unit, mutation, determinism, gate-canary, file-guard, build, browser visual-regression, smoke, strict drift-audit) and return per-gate pass/fail. Fails loud on any regression. Verifies this repo's own prototypes; not a hosted service for external code. Wraps scripts/preflight.mjs.

gates.description: Optional subset of gate names to run (e.g. ["lint", "unit"]). Omit to run the full set in preflight order.

outputSchema.description: Mirrors scripts/preflight.mjs's record(name, status, note) results plus an overall pass flag.

ok.description: True only if every non-skipped gate passed.

name.description: Gate name (e.g. lint, typecheck, gate canary, file guard, smoke).

status.description: SKIPPED(env) is used only for browser/smoke when no Chromium is available (recorded in the PR body, verified in CI).
